title: oxalis dehradunensis
intro: Oxalis dehradunensis, also known as the Himalayan wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family. This plant is native to the Himalayan region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oxalis dehradunensis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Oxalis dehradunensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
